title: bidens esmartinezii
intro: Bidens esmartinezii, also known as the Mexican thistle or Mexican beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
